subcodes.title: Lawh-i-'Ali
subcodes.first_line: O Ali! From the day when that promised Tablet - which hath been designated as the Cry, the Hour and the Trumpet - was dispatched, the ungodly [3.5s]... ...The voice of the Divine Herald, proceeding out of the throne of God, declareth: O ye My loved ones! Suffer not the hem of My sacred vesture
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی از یومی که لوح معهود که به صیحه و ساعه و صور نامیده شده ارسال گشت مشرکین
subcodes.subjects: @defending the Faith; protecting the Cause; apologetics, @status of material wealth; wealth and poverty, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @work as worship, @fairmindedness; personal justice [insaf], @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness
